gist.headline: The hive remembers your tier
gist.blurb: We put the tier and reset time back in the profile endpoint. Third-party apps can stop guessing when your credits refill.
gist.summary: Restored the tier and nextResetAt fields to the /account/profile endpoint, allowing apps to read quota metadata without requiring extra permissions.
gist.impact: Third-party plugins can once again accurately display your current tier and exactly when your credits will refill.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a clock or timer, representing the 'nextResetAt' and 'tier' restoration. A retro terminal displays the quota.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, fixing a glowing digital clock next to a chunky retro terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. The bee shares the frame with a small pixelated hourglass. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'QUOTA'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
